M1050_PPV_RCVD_AGNCY M1050 Pneumococcal Vaccine (PPV) Received in Agency This field indicates if the patient received the PPV during this episode of care in agency. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
M1055_PPV_RSN_NOT_RCVD_AGNCY M1055 Pneumococcal Vaccine (PV)- Reason Not Received This field indicates the reason why the PPV was not received
